settings.title: Meet Dana, Who Keeps Our Cellar in Order
settings.excerpt: She tastes every bottle before it reaches your table, and she has opinions about temperature.
settings.body:
Most of what makes Corkwell work happens before you sit down, and a lot of it is Dana's doing. She manages the cellar, logs every delivery, and decides what comes off the list.

Dana started with us pouring weekend shifts and now tastes through forty-odd samples a month. Her rule is simple: if she would not pour it for a friend, it does not go on.

Her current obsession is serving reds a touch cooler than most places do, around sixty degrees. Order the Loire cabernet franc and you will see what she means.
